pricing.rationale: Production traffic is steady enough to stay on dedicated pricing after right-sizing.

highlights: Average daytime query concurrency peaks at 14, well below the capacity provided by 4 replicas.
Index storage uses 41% of available partition capacity even during weekly ingestion spikes.
Only 4% of queries request semantic ranking despite the feature being enabled globally.
Vector indexes use 768-dimension embeddings for scenarios that only require coarse retrieval.
risks: Scale changes must preserve the replica count required by the service-level agreement.
Vector tuning should be validated against recall targets before rollout to production.
